name: maddie synths
author: Madelyn Yeary
description: VCV Rack ports of the maddie-synths eurorack firmwares.

modules.name: Butterfly
modules.description: Lorenz attractor chaotic CV generator. Port of the mod1-butterfly firmware.

modules.name: Claves
modules.description: Tunable claves / woodblock percussion voice with sine-triangle morph and 1V/Oct pitch. Port of the mod2-claves firmware.

modules.name: Envelope
modules.description: 3-output AR envelope generator with end-of-cycle gate. Port of the mod1-eg firmware.

modules.name: Dual ENV
modules.description: Dual attack-decay envelope generator with shared time controls and per-trigger random variation. Port of the mod1-dual-ad-env firmware.

modules.name: LFO
modules.description: Multi-waveform LFO (sine, triangle, square, saw, reverse-saw, DC) with CV over rate, wave and level. Port of the mod1-lfo firmware.

modules.name: Euclidean
modules.description: 8/16-step Euclidean rhythm sequencer with probability gating. Port of the mod1-euclidean firmware.

modules.name: Logic Pair
modules.description: Dual boolean-logic gate processor (AND/OR/XOR/compare/max-min/flip-flop) on two gate/CV inputs. Port of the mod1-logic-pair firmware.

modules.name: Random CV
modules.description: Periodic random CV sequencer with selectable step length and gate probability. Port of the mod1-random-cv firmware.

modules.name: Rnd + Lag
modules.description: Random walk CV generator with exponentially-lagged follower output and gravity mode. Port of the mod1-random-lag firmware.

modules.name: Trig Burst
modules.description: Clock-syncable trigger burst generator: fires N triggers at a clock-divided interval on each input trigger. Port of the mod1-trigger-burst firmware.

modules.name: Tap Tempo
modules.description: 4-output tap-tempo master clock with fixed and variable multiply and two divide outputs. Port of the mod1-tap-tempo firmware.

modules.name: Terrain LFO
modules.description: Procedurally generated triple-wavetable chaotic LFO with detuned outputs and probabilistic slow-mo. Port of the mod1-terrain-lfo firmware.

modules.name: VCO
modules.description: Six-waveform PolyBLEP oscillator (sine/tri/square/saw/FM) with 1V/Oct and octave shift. Port of the mod2-vco firmware.

modules.name: Square VCO
modules.description: Square-wave VCO with sine-LFO vibrato and chiptune octave-toggle mode. Port of the mod2-square-vco firmware.

modules.name: Clap
modules.description: TR-808-style hand-clap: band-pass filtered noise bursts with an exponential reverb tail. Port of the mod2-clap firmware.

modules.name: Hihat
modules.description: White/blue-noise hi-hat: band-pass filtered noise with adjustable decay shape. Port of the mod2-hihat firmware.

modules.name: Kick
modules.description: Sine-wave kick drum with exponential pitch sweep, soft-clip and decay. Port of the mod2-kick firmware.

modules.name: FM Drum
modules.description: Two-operator FM percussion voice (carrier+modulator FM, ratio/index/amp envelopes, tanh soft-clip). Port of the mod2-fm-drum firmware.

modules.name: Flux
modules.description: Physical-modeling / resonance multi-mode voice (modal, Karplus-Strong, noise, Lorenz, drone). Port of the mod2-flux firmware.

modules.name: Spiral
modules.description: Shepard-tone / auditory-illusion multi-mode generator (rising, falling, barber-pole, Risset, tritone, cluster, Euler). Port of the mod2-spiral firmware.

modules.name: Acid 303
modules.description: Generative 303-style acid bass voice with a Turing-machine sequencer: slides, accents, selectable scales and waveforms, clock/accent inputs and transpose CV. Port of the mod2-acid303 firmware.

modules.name: Breakbeats
modules.description: PCM break-beat slicer: triggers playback of two baked drum loops from six slice points, with variable speed, length and loop mode. Port of the mod2-breakbeats firmware.

modules.name: Sample
modules.description: One-shot 16-bit PCM sample player: up to 18 baked samples selected by group + index (with a +6 gate), variable-speed interpolated playback. Port of the mod2-sample firmware.

wipNote: wipModules are Claude-generated maddie synths originals excluded from the build; move an entry back to modules to re-enable it (see rack-plugins/Makefile WIP_SOURCES and plugin.cpp).

wipModules.name: Bitcrusher
wipModules.description: Bit-depth & sample-rate reduction: unfiltered sample-and-hold downsampling (full rate to ~200 Hz, external-clockable) with continuous 16-to-1-bit quantization in truncate, TPDF-dither or AND-mask styles. Port of the mod2-bitcrusher firmware.

wipModules.name: Delay
wipModules.description: Clean/dirty mono digital delay: 10 ms to 5 s with crossfading read heads, feedback to ~110% soft-limited into self-oscillation, clock-syncable to musical divisions, and an infinite-repeat hold gate. Port of the mod2-delay firmware.

wipModules.name: Tape Echo
wipModules.description: Worn-tape delay: time changes glide with tape-speed pitch bends, a single tape-age macro drives wow/flutter, saturation, HF loss and dropouts, and a splice gate performs tape-stop lurches. Port of the mod2-tape-echo firmware.

wipModules.name: Distortion
wipModules.description: Multi-algorithm drive: Soft / Hard / Tube / Foldback / Fuzz waveshapers with 2x-oversampled shaping, auto level compensation, tilt tone and wet/dry parallel drive. Port of the mod2-distortion firmware.

wipModules.name: Chorus
wipModules.description: Juno-style chorus + string-machine ensemble: anti-phase modulated dual taps (Chorus I/II) or triple taps on slow+fast phase-offset LFOs (Ensemble), mono-in mono-out. Port of the mod2-chorus firmware.

wipModules.name: Resonator
wipModules.description: Rings-like tuned resonator bank: modal band-pass partials, chord-tuned comb clusters or sympathetic Karplus strings, excited by external audio or a strike-triggered noise burst, with a damp gate. Port of the mod2-resonator firmware.

wipModules.name: Flanger
wipModules.description: Swept-comb flanger: a fractional tap sweeps 0.2-12 ms with bipolar screaming feedback, triangle/sine/envelope-follow sweep sources and a manual hand-sweep mode. Port of the mod2-flanger firmware.

wipModules.name: Phaser
wipModules.description: 4/6/8-stage allpass phaser: exponential 100 Hz - 4 kHz sweep with per-stage corner detune, DC-blocked resonance and a manual hand-sweep mode. Port of the mod2-phaser firmware.

wipModules.name: Ring Mod
wipModules.description: Carrier-oscillator ring modulator: sine-to-square morphing phase-continuous carrier, AM blend, and Fixed / pitch-Track / S&H carrier modes with hard sync and an octave-drop gate. Port of the mod2-ringmod firmware.

wipModules.name: Tremolo
wipModules.description: LFO-driven VCA amplitude modulation with sine/triangle/square/ramp shapes, clock sync and phase reset. Port of the mod2-tremolo firmware.

wipModules.name: Wavefolder
wipModules.description: Digital West-Coast Serge/Buchla-style wavefolder with reflect, sine and cascade curves. Port of the mod2-wavefolder firmware.

wipModules.name: Filter
wipModules.description: Tilt EQ and resonant low-pass / high-pass / band-pass cleanup filter. Port of the mod2-filter firmware.

wipModules.name: Dynamics
wipModules.description: One-knob compressor, brickwall limiter, and trigger ducker. Port of the mod2-dynamics firmware.

wipModules.name: Comb
wipModules.description: Tuned comb filter: a single precise, playable feedforward/feedback comb with bipolar feedback (positive = full harmonic series, negative = hollow odd-only) that rings and self-oscillates into a soft-limited drone, plus a nested all-pass mode and feedback-path damping. Port of the mod2-comb firmware.

wipModules.name: Karplus
wipModules.description: Dedicated Karplus-Strong plucked string: a tuned feedback delay line excited by an internal colourable noise burst or by external audio, with pluck / bow (continuous-drive) / drone modes, in-loop damping and a palm-mute gate. Port of the mod2-karplus firmware.

wipModules.name: Freeze
wipModules.description: Buffer capture & seamless loop: freeze a slice of incoming audio into an always-recording ~5.5 s buffer and loop it click-free for instant drones and held chords, with loop length, window scan, Forward/Ping-pong/Half-speed playback, and re-capture. Port of the mod2-freeze firmware.

wipModules.name: Stutter
wipModules.description: Clock-aware beat repeat / glitch stutter. Port of the mod2-stutter firmware.

wipModules.name: Reverse Delay
wipModules.description: Classic ambient reverse echo — chunked reverse playback with swelling pre-echo trails, re-reversing feedback, and Reverse/Alternating/Octave-up modes. Port of the mod2-reverse-delay firmware.

wipModules.name: Glitch Delay
wipModules.description: Delay with random skips, reverse chunks, stutters and tape-cut splices. Port of the mod2-glitch-delay firmware.

wipModules.name: Freq Shifter
wipModules.description: Bode-style single-sideband frequency shifter — shifts every partial by a fixed Hz amount, from slow barberpole to inharmonic clangor, with feedback spirals. Port of the mod2-freq-shifter firmware.

wipModules.name: Reverb
wipModules.description: Hall & plate algorithmic reverb. Port of the mod2-reverb firmware.

wipModules.name: Granular
wipModules.description: Live-buffer granular delay / cloud textures. Port of the mod2-granular firmware.

wipModules.name: Pitch Shifter
wipModules.description: Octave & granular pitch shifter — two-tap delay-line harmonizer with octave, free (semitone-detented) and detune modes. Port of the mod2-pitch-shifter firmware.

wipModules.name: Spectral Freeze
wipModules.description: FFT-domain infinite sustain — freeze the spectrum for an endless, motionless-yet-alive pad from any instant of sound. Port of the mod2-spectral-freeze firmware.

wipModules.name: FX
wipModules.description: Multi-algorithm effects platform: sixteen effects (delay, tape echo, reverb, chorus, flanger, phaser, bitcrusher, distortion, wavefolder, resonator, karplus, comb, ring mod, pitch shifter, freeze, glitch delay) behind one identical control surface, switched click-free. Port of the mod2-fx firmware.
